design_request_candidate.objective: Deduplicate Study001 RL-001..007 and Study002 REV-LEARN-001..008 into one MAS v2 initial-draft gate plus one citation/currentness and build/snapshot/currentness model.
acceptance_criteria: One MAS v2 initial-draft gate orders identity, partition/estimand/censoring, complexity, linked performance/DCA, then claim boundary.
Citation closure/currentness and build/snapshot/currentness remain explicit state and dependency graphs.
Study001 RL-003 and RL-006 unique semantics remain present.
Study002 REV-LEARN-004, REV-LEARN-006, REV-LEARN-007, and REV-LEARN-008 unique semantics remain present.
Scholar remains a professional validator, producer, and independent consumer only.
Duplicate rules, a parallel new Skill, and candidate-receipt authority promotion are absent.
non_goals: Do not emit a repository patch or developer work order from OMA.
Do not create, qualify, activate, adopt, or roll back an AgentVersion from provider completion.
Do not expand permissions or inspect protected test bodies.
Do not introduce an implicit max_tokens default.

resume_conditions: The MAS owner publishes and installs the authorized carrier closure.
Fresh discovery exposes one active registered MAS AgentVersion.
The target owner authorizes improve for the exact run, version, and activation revision.
The active AgentVersion permission_refs are copied without expansion.
All opl-content source, evidence, and qualification bytes are available to the StageRun.
